blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 476 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.3" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
